name: Wall Street Oasis
positioning: Community-driven finance career resource; forum + guides hybrid
content_strengths: Enormous historical content library; strong brand recognition among US students; user-generated Q&A adds freshness
monetization: Premium courses (WSO Academy); job board; company database subscriptions
what_to_outperform: Offer cleaner UX and faster navigation; provide structured drilling (not just reading); build GEO-optimized answer-first content; target international markets (India/UK/HK/SG) more directly

name: Mergers & Inquisitions
positioning: Premium editorial resource; perceived as authoritative by US students
content_strengths: Long-form guides with depth; strong brand trust; covers US/UK/global; has superday and HireVue specific content
monetization: Courses (BIWS Financial Modeling); coaching; affiliate revenue
what_to_outperform: Compete on freshness (2026 updates); cleaner mobile experience; interactive practice (not just reading); AI-powered feedback loop; target underserved markets

name: M&I Superday Guide
positioning: Part of M&I ecosystem; strong SEO for superday keywords
content_strengths: Detailed superday walkthrough with process specifics
what_to_outperform: Provide a structured 7-day plan format vs. long narrative; add regional variants; integrate with live practice tool

name: M&I HireVue Guide
positioning: Part of M&I ecosystem; HireVue-specific SEO
content_strengths: Covers HireVue setup and common questions
what_to_outperform: Add platform-specific setup guide; include practice script CTA with actual template download

name: Wall Street Prep Red Book
positioning: Premium course product; Red Book is a well-known brand
content_strengths: Deep technical content; strong brand in financial modeling training
what_to_outperform: Content is paywalled — we publish free guides with clear upgrade path; focus on interview prep vs. modeling training

name: Wall Street Prep Superday
positioning: Knowledge base entry; part of WSP ecosystem
content_strengths: Part of a broader course ecosystem; good keyword coverage
what_to_outperform: More actionable checklist and day-by-day plan format; free without registration

name: Corporate Finance Institute
positioning: Professional certification and training platform; wide content library
content_strengths: Broad finance educational content; strong SEO across finance topics
monetization: CFI certification subscriptions; course sales; affiliate
what_to_outperform: More interview-specific (vs. general finance education); better GEO content; faster UX

name: Street of Walls
positioning: Free resource; modeled after training course format
content_strengths: Comprehensive question lists; covers behavioral and technical; free
monetization: Unclear current monetization; possible consulting leads
what_to_outperform: Cleaner UX; better mobile experience; more recent content (some SOW pages appear dated); add AI-powered practice

name: Financial Edge
content_strengths: UK market coverage; CFA/finance training context
what_to_outperform: Cover non-UK markets equally well; better US/India/Asia content; more actionable (frameworks vs. question lists)

name: IGotAnOffer
positioning: Case interview and finance interview prep; strong tech and consulting coverage
content_strengths: Growing finance content; clean design; step-by-step format
what_to_outperform: Deeper IB-specific content; integrate AI drilling vs. human coach dependency; broader GEO content
